title: Brass Compression Straight Connector Fittings for Plumbing and Heating Systems, 10mm x 10mm, Pack of 2, Gold
features: Materials: Brass construction with 10mm compression fittings designed for plumbing and heating system connections
Design: Straight configuration featuring compression mechanism for pipe joining with secure seal
Compatibility: Functions with copper, steel, stainless steel and plastic pipe systems
Applications: Suitable for water supply lines and heating system installations
Specifications: 10mm x 10mm dimensions with brass exterior finish and compression-type connection method
description: Product Description Conex System The Conex clamping ring connector has been known for decades as quick and easy to process. Conex has proven itself particularly in the repair area and in the renovation of old buildings. The clamping ring connection is tensile, corrosion-proof and permanently tight. During installation, the connection can be made without special tools and without notching the pipe, whereby the clamping ring connector can be used universally due to its design. In addition, the range of compression fittings is approved for drinking water and gas installations DICSOVER OUR RANGE OF COMPRESSION FITTINGS Compression fittings are available for any repairs or replacements you may need! Browse our range so you’re never left without! STRAIGHT CONNECTOR Permanently tight connection without special tools Manufactured from high quality brass material, fittings are compatible with low carbon steel, stainless steel and a range of plastic pipe Suitable for gas, compressed air and water applications EQUAL ELBOW COMPRESSION Permanently tight connection without special tools Manufactured from high quality brass material, fittings are compatible with low carbon steel, stainless steel and a range of plastic pipe Suitable for gas, compressed air and water applications EQUAL TEE COMPRESSION Permanently tight connection without special tools Manufactured from high quality brass material, fittings are compatible with low carbon steel, stainless steel and a range of plastic pipe Suitable for gas, compressed air and water applications WALLPLATE ELBOW COMPRESSION Permanently tight connection without special tools Manufactured from high quality brass material, fittings are compatible with low carbon steel, stainless steel and a range of plastic pipe Suitable for gas, compressed air and water applications 16x15 COMPRESSION FITTINGS RANGE AVAILABLE With our 16mm x 15mm compression fittings you can easly connect 16mm plastic pipe with 15mm copper pipe.
